rows.label: tev068301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Zo Zazhi about the
Growth's headquarters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Zo Zazhi about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Zo Zazhi about the final
battle at the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Zo Zazhi about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Zo Zazhi about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_SEL2041
rows.name: Ask Zo Zazhi about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0001
rows.name:
They have installed themselves inside
a grotesque castle in Cauldros. ...Pah.
Their evil knows no bounds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0002
rows.name:
I know you have a quarrel
with them, but so do I![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I must train hard and become stronger
than anyone so I can wring the life out
of those fiends with my own two hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Consider it a challenge. Will BLADE
strike them first, or will I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0009
rows.name:
Zo Langra says he is concerned for me,
but he can save his whimpering protests.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0010
rows.name:
I am a warrior, not some precious maiden! I intend
to take up arms and visit every indignity we have
suffered back upon our enemies tenfold![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0011
rows.name:
Know this—my elder brothers taught me
well, and I will prove it by besting you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Then I will seek out my hated enemy,
wring the life from him, and exact
vengeance for my brothers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0017
rows.name:
I tried to join you on the front
lines during the mission to the
Central Life. How I tried![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0018
rows.name:
But Zo Langra, my fool of a little brother,
interfered. He told me I would have to cut
him down before he would let me leave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0019
rows.name:
And now I missed the final
battle... How it vexes me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG0020
rows.name:
I wanted to be the first to drive my
sword into Luxaar's cold, black heart![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG1001
rows.name: He is dead? I see. Then maybe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG1002
rows.name:
Thank you, [ST:playername ]. Maybe now my elder
brothers can rest in peace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG1003
rows.name:
From now on, I shall fulfill my duty as heiress to
the House of Zo and act responsibly. Langra and I
will ensure our house survives and flourishes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG1004
rows.name:
And if any dare attempt to tarnish
our honor, I will make them pay
dearly...or die trying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2001
rows.name:
Besides my elder brothers,
there is another I admire.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2002
rows.name:
Her name is Ge Jewhe, and she
is just the sort of woman and
warrior I strive to be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2003
rows.name:
I feared for her when I heard she ran off
to exact justice upon the Growth, but to
my delight, she has returned home safely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2004
rows.name:
...Ah. I see now. This is how my little
brother must have felt when I came home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2005
rows.name: Again, Ge Jewhe teaches me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2010
rows.name:
Besides my elder brothers,
there was another I admired.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2011
rows.name:
Her name was Ge Jewhe, and she
was just the sort of woman and
warrior I strive to be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2012
rows.name:
I feared for her when I heard she ran off
to exact justice upon the Growth, and was
greatly dismayed at the news of her death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2013
rows.name:
Twice now, I have felt the
pain of being left behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068301_MSG2014
rows.name:
Now I must do my part to stop any
more of my friends from dying. Ge
Jewhe's death must not be in vain![ST:wait ]
